wiki.summary: STEP ON UP is a song made by The Living Tombstone and McGwire in 2025, the song protagonist is Montgomery the gator in the middle of his dissociation, fantasizing about murdering his band mates with the intention of being the spotlight, achieving his fame. The song gets into the Five Nights at freddy: Security Breach events showing us on the movie video some of the characters and physical locations introduced in the game. Read more on Last.fm.
